title: rosa villosa subsp. pomifera
intro: Rosa villosa subsp. pomifera is a subspecies of fragrant rose that belongs to the genus Rosa, known for its distinctive fragrant flowers and edible hips. This plant is used in herbal medicine, primarily for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally utilized to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Rosa villosa subsp. pomifera have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
